meta.title: Panel 1: Power Shifts in the Eastern Mediterranean: The Emer
meta.description:
10:00 - 11:15 am
Panel 1: "Political and Security Changes in the Eastern Mediterranean"
Opening Remarks: Kenneth Weinstein 
Moderator: Dr. Seth Cropsey
Panelists: 
The Honorable Congresswoman Ileana Ros-Lehtinen
The Honorable Congressman Brad Schneider 
H.E. Christos Panagopoulos, Greek Ambassador to the United States
Eli Groner, Israeli Minister for Economic Affairs to the United States
H.E. George Chacalli, Cypriot Ambassador to the United States
 - Captured Live on Ustream
